scripts.test:integration: vitest run tests/adminUsers.integration.test.ts tests/draftJourneys.integration.test.ts tests/draftParticipants.integration.test.ts tests/activateJourney.integration.test.ts tests/cancelDraftJourney.integration.test.ts tests/closeJourney.integration.test.ts tests/listActiveJourneys.integration.test.ts tests/reserveLine.integration.test.ts tests/sendCount.integration.test.ts tests/reviewCount.integration.test.ts tests/correctCount.integration.test.ts tests/reassignCorrection.integration.test.ts tests/releaseReservation.integration.test.ts --no-file-parallelism --testTimeout=30000
scripts.test:emulators: npm run build && firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.json --only auth,firestore,functions --project demo-vivero-control-etapa3 "npm run emulator:seed && npm run test:integration && npm run test:rules"
scripts.test:rules:emulator: firebase emulators:exec --config ../firebase.json --only firestore --project demo-vivero-control-etapa3 "npm run emulator:seed && npm run test:rules"
